theme: Light mode default, Neo-Brutalist SaaS (Commercial Brutalism) style. Uses warm cream backgrounds, hard black borders, and stark high-saturation accents to create a communal, trustworthy, yet modern tech-forward vibe.

layouts.homepage: Bento grids, overlapping elements, large typography, asymmetrical layout. Generous spacing (p-12 to p-24).
layouts.user_dashboard: Grid layout (md:grid-cols-3) with bento-style cards for active subs, recent payments. Spacing (gap-6).
layouts.admin_dashboard: Dense, high-density grid (md:grid-cols-4), tabular data with hard borders. No soft UI here.

components.cards: White background, 2px black border, 8px 8px black drop shadow. No soft blur.
components.buttons: Slightly rounded rectangles. 2px black border. High-saturation background (e.g., Electric Blue or Red). On hover: shift up and left with increased solid shadow.
components.inputs: Shadcn based but overridden. 2px solid black border, square corners, white background. Focus: ring-0, border-blue-600 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A].

hero_friends_tv.description: Group of friends watching TV, usable for hero background or trust sections.

hero_friends_music.description: Friends listening to music, great for Spotify sub-service highlight.

netflix_abstract.description: Netflix logo on phone, usable for service cards.

spotify_abstract.description: Spotify icon on phone, usable for service cards.

youtube_abstract.description: YouTube logo abstract, usable for service cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons (e.g., yarn add @phosphor-icons/react).
Install and use sonner for toasts (e.g., npx shadcn-ui@latest add sonner).
Use Shadcn UI components but explicitly override their styles in Tailwind classes to match the 'Commercial Brutalism' aesthetic: 2px black borders, no soft shadows, solid black drop shadows.
Implement 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Update index.css or App.css to import these fonts from Google Fonts.
Never use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical or bento grid layouts for the homepage.
Ensure the application background is a warm cream (#F4F3ED) instead of plain white to provide 'tactile' warmth.
For the dashboards, use dense but structured layouts. Use the hard borders to separate data points.
Use Phosphor icons or pure SVGs for service logos if images feel too heavy.
Implement Framer Motion for interactive micro-animations (e.g., brutalist buttons pressing down on click).
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and brutalist solid shadows.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow.
Always use modern button styles with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style. Avoid AI slop.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Shadcn components have opinionated rules, change these when customizing to fit the brutalist aesthetic.
